name: smartbooks-accounting-app
description: SmartBooks Accounting App split into frontend, backend, shared, and docs folders.

scripts.check: npm run docs:check && node --check scripts/run-coverage.js && node --check backend/src/server.js && node --check backend/src/persistence-adapter.js && node --check backend/src/database-persistence-adapter.js && node --check frontend/src/services/navigation-model.js && node --check frontend/src/services/icon-service.js && node --check frontend/src/services/storage-service.js && node --check frontend/src/services/accounting-service.js && node --check frontend/src/services/dashboard-operations-service.js && node --check frontend/src/services/import-service.js && node --check frontend/src/main.js && node --check frontend/src/features/sales-tax-inventory-ui.js && node --check frontend/src/features/workflows-and-reporting.js && node --check frontend/src/features/dashboard-widgets.js && node --check frontend/src/features/menu-customization.js && node --check frontend/src/features/sidebar-navigation.js && node --check frontend/src/features/navigation-search.js && node --check frontend/src/features/record-workflows.js && node --check frontend/src/runtime/stability-and-api.js && node --check playwright.config.js && node --check playwright.pages.config.js && node --check tests/unit/services.test.js && node --check tests/unit/accounting-service.test.js && node --check tests/unit/dashboard-operations-service.test.js && node --check tests/unit/backend-state-api.test.js && node --check tests/unit/persistence-adapter.test.js && node --check tests/unit/database-persistence-adapter.test.js && node --check tests/unit/storage-backend-service.test.js && node --check tests/functional/support/smartbooks-app.js && node --check tests/functional/startup-navigation.spec.js && node --check tests/functional/customize-menu.spec.js && node --check tests/functional/dashboard-customization.spec.js && node --check tests/functional/persistence-runtime.spec.js && node --check tests/functional/performance.spec.js && node --check tests/functional/global-search.spec.js && node --check tests/functional/accounting-workflows.spec.js && node --check tests/functional/accessibility-and-visual.spec.js && node --check tests/functional/ui-contract-snapshots.spec.js && node --check tests/functional/utilities.spec.js && node --check tests/functional/pages-smoke.spec.js
scripts.test:unit: node tests/unit/services.test.js && node tests/unit/accounting-service.test.js && node tests/unit/dashboard-operations-service.test.js && node tests/unit/backend-state-api.test.js && node tests/unit/persistence-adapter.test.js && node tests/unit/database-persistence-adapter.test.js && node tests/unit/storage-backend-service.test.js
scripts.test:ci: npm run check && npm run test:unit && npm run coverage:check && npm run test:functional
scripts.test:all: npm run check && npm test && npm run test:functional
